_publications._publicationTitle: A high-throughput kinome screen reveals serum/glucocorticoid-regulated kinase 1 as a therapeutic target for NF2-deficient meningiomas.

_contextSnippet: AZD2014 efficiently inhibited both mTORC1-dependent and mTORC2-dependent substrate phosphorylation at 100 nM
details: Efficiently inhibited both mTORC1-dependent and mTORC2-dependent substrate phosphorylation at 100 nM
